title: Reversed Spawn Eggs
description: Reverts the spawn egg textures introduced in Minecraft snapshot 25w08a back to their OG designs and adds new textures for new mob eggs.
body:
![REVERSED SPAWN EGGS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/915ae4db9effe351f5616e109355873d1137eb02.png)

## **🥚 About**
**This resource pack gives the new mob spawn eggs a classic-style appearance, inspired by the textures from earlier versions of Minecraft. It also adds old textures of the spawn eggs for mobs from before the change.**

**🤔 How to install**

For Modrinth web users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.
- After you download Reversed_Spawn_Eggs.zip go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to <user>/roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks

For Modrinth app users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.

### **📖 Compatibility**
**Optifine is NOT required (as well as EMF and ETF)**

Version warnings can be safely ignored if you’re on a supported version - with each update that changes baby mobs - come back for a newer version. 🙃

_Disclaimer:
This resource pack includes a mix of original textures from older versions of Minecraft (property of Mojang)* and textures created by me**._

*Spawn Eggs for mobs added before 1.21.5,
**Spawn Eggs for mobs added after 1.21.5
